subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One maketh mention of him who desireth to hear the Call of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, He Whose mention hath been extolled by them that have clung fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر المظلوم لمن اراد ان یسمع ندآء الله المهیمن القیوم الذی ذکره من تمسک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
